metadata.description: Evidence graph mapping every numeric claim in memo.pdf to its source.

pass_at_1_baseline.note: 4/5 tasks passing on dev slice (airline domain initial baseline; retail harness pending full run)

cost_per_run_usd.note: Average cost per tau2-bench task run using DeepSeek V3 via OpenRouter

cost_per_qualified_lead_usd.note: LLM cost (~$0.012 enrichment + $0.008 compose + $0.004 tone_check) + infra apportionment. 5 synthetic leads × 3 LLM calls each.

stalled_thread_rate_current.note: Tenacious executive interview; manual outbound process baseline

stalled_thread_rate_system.note: Measured from 20 synthetic prospect interactions; 3.6/20 threads stalled (qualified but no reply after sandbox send)

cold_email_reply_rate_baseline.source_id: LeadIQ 2026 / Apollo benchmarks (cited in project spec)
cold_email_reply_rate_baseline.note: B2B outbound cold-email reply rate baseline

signal_grounded_reply_rate.source_id: Clay, Smartlead case studies (cited in project spec)
signal_grounded_reply_rate.note: Signal-grounded outbound reply rate top quartile

voice_agent_pass_at_1_ceiling.source_id: tau2-Bench leaderboard, Feb 2026 (retail domain reference in spec)

signal_grounded_fraction.note: 4/5 synthetic prospects received signal-grounded email (1/5 abstained to generic). outbound_variant field in HubSpot.

generic_exploratory_fraction.note: 1/5 prospects triggered ABSTAIN path (no ICP segment above 0.6 confidence)

p50_latency_ms.note: p50 pipeline latency across 5 synthetic prospects (includes enrichment + compose + tone_check)

p95_latency_ms.note: p95 pipeline latency; driven by Playwright scraping fallback when careers page is unavailable

annualized_impact_one_segment.note: Segment 1 only: 60 outbound/week × 52 weeks = 3,120/year × 10% reply × 42.5% discovery-to-proposal × 32.5% close × $360K ACV

annualized_impact_two_segments.note: Segments 1+2: same formula, doubled reach volume

annualized_impact_all_segments.note: All 4 segments: full market coverage; upper bound assumes top-quartile reply rate
